Summary.raw: Todo sqlite storage, embeddings, and vector search

Body.raw: Migrate worktrees to ~/.todo/worktrees; store todos in ~/.todo/sqlite.db; retire TODO.json; add sqlite-vec and embedder pluggable layer; implement todo search with vector similarity. This ticket is the last TODO.json.

AC: All todos accessed only via todo.py against sqlite; ~/.todo-worktrees migrated and removed; todo search finds relevant tickets; tests pass; skill/docs updated.
